title: cardamomum linguiforme
intro: Cardamomum linguiforme, also known as Green Cardamom, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. It is native to the Western Ghats of India and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative properties. The health benefits of Cardamomum linguiforme include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve oral health. Herbal preparations of Cardamomum linguiforme include tea, capsules, and essential oil, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
